subject: Draft: Mid-year CIP progress narrative for the district
body: Held for Andrew's review. Submission-ready progress narrative covering the four campus improvement goals, the grant expenditure true-up, family-engagement turnout, and open barriers to instruction.

subject: Draft: Note to the guest teachers - English and Vietnamese
body: Held for Andrew's review. A short thank-you to the enrichment guest teachers in English alongside Vietnamese, so the people who carried the program hear the outcome from him.
